name: Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Intelligence API
description: Extract real-time Airbnb listings, pricing, availability calendars, and reviews for any market. Includes AI-powered occupancy estimates and revenue potential analysis.

pricing.comparison: AirDNA charges $99-999/month. Our service provides the same data via x402 micropayments at a fraction of the cost.

whyMobileProxy: Airbnb uses heavy JavaScript rendering and aggressive IP blocking. Real 4G/5G mobile carrier IPs from Proxies.sx are practically impossible to block, ensuring 99.9% success rates for listing and pricing data.
limitations: Reviews limited to top 50 per listing
